description: A graphic with a New York Post masthead at the top and a black headline reading 'DHS employee murdered while walking dog by criminal immigrant who was naturalized under Biden: feds'. Below the headline is a color photograph of a smiling woman with her hair tied up, wearing many race-finisher medals around her neck, standing in front of a theme-park castle structure.
notable_text: NEW YORK POST; DHS employee murdered while walking dog by criminal immigrant who was naturalized under Biden: feds
